---
schema: verdi.deviation/v1
covers: f7f1bdf8ba0fa97f8b8feaecaf64dd1641549b82
findings:
  - { id: judged-collision-candidate-prefill, kind: judged, text: "ac-1 states that a regenerated judged finding whose slug matches a prior dispositioned finding \"is presented as a candidate — the old ruling and the old text rendered beside the new text\" — with no stated exception. The implementation (ReconcileJudged, reaffirm.go) deliberately suppresses the candidate pre-fill whenever the matching slug is part of a within-run collision: no member of the collision gets the side-by-side old-ruling/old-text rendering; the prior is routed to not-resurfaced as a backing record and the human must reconstruct the comparison manually across the not-resurfaced section and the suffixed live members. This is a ledger-adjudicated (L-N13) resolution of the ac-1/ac-4 tension — the prior is never silently carried or discarded, stays budget-counted, and the contract-violation finding is disclosed — but the spec text itself never sanctions withholding the pre-fill, so a human hitting a collision loses exactly the beside-rendering ac-1 promises for deciding what changed. (confidence 0.20)", disposition: accepted-deviation, note: "The L-N13-adjudicated collision exception vs ac-1's unqualified letter: the withholding is deliberate (ambiguous lineage must not be candidate-rendered — the design wave's core refutation); ac-1's text gains the collision-exception clause at the endgame ratification pass, tracked with the ac-2/ac-4 amendments." }
not-resurfaced:
  - { id: judged-feature-union-superseded-story-archive, kind: judged, text: "The superseded-story hole previously reported here is now adjudicated as disclose-and-exclude (ledger L-N12, checkFeatureSpecStaleCondition's supersededExtra lines riding every verdict), which cures the SILENCE — but the exclusion itself remains a semantic deviation from ac-4's declared truth-condition: an accepted deviation recorded in a superseded implementing story's archived report contributes exactly ZERO to the feature-close union, where ac-4 says 'counts exactly once, never zero and never twice' over EVERY implementing story's archived report, with no superseded carve-out in the spec's text. The rationale (supersession is the spec-stale counterweight's own prescribed remedy; the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced) is recorded only in the invention ledger and code comments — the provenance discipline's own machinery (an accepted-deviation disposition with a note on this report) is the sanctioned place to carry a deliberate divergence from an AC's literal text, so this is re-surfaced for that recorded human ruling rather than left to pass as if ac-4's universal quantifier held. (confidence 0.30)", disposition: accepted-deviation, note: "The recorded human ruling this finding requests (ledger L-N12, controller-adjudicated at the seventh round): a superseded implementing story's archived accepted-deviations are EXCLUDED from the feature-close union, disclosed by name on every verdict — never silently zero. Rationale: the spec-stale counterweight exists to force supersession over dispositioning-around; once supersession HAS occurred, the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced, so counting them would punish the budget's own prescribed remedy, while silence would launder them. ac-4's universal quantifier gains the superseded-story clause at the endgame ratification pass (with the P2-RT entries) — this disposition is the report-level record of the deliberate divergence until that text lands." }
digest: sha256:17040954b0a5e26e6d3c15093212c5c16b2db119055b939d6a76ba91e0d9fbbc
integrity: sha256:590fa7b5980e2e024b919efcd97c3a807c46117783c0420e2d7f8a03073ca152
judge_integrity: { stdin_b64: , raw_result: "```json\n{\"findings\":[{\"id\":\"collision-candidate-prefill\",\"text\":\"ac-1 states that a regenerated judged finding whose slug matches a prior dispositioned finding \\\"is presented as a candidate — the old ruling and the old text rendered beside the new text\\\" — with no stated exception. The implementation (ReconcileJudged, reaffirm.go) deliberately suppresses the candidate pre-fill whenever the matching slug is part of a within-run collision: no member of the collision gets the side-by-side old-ruling/old-text rendering; the prior is routed to not-resurfaced as a backing record and the human must reconstruct the comparison manually across the not-resurfaced section and the suffixed live members. This is a ledger-adjudicated (L-N13) resolution of the ac-1/ac-4 tension — the prior is never silently carried or discarded, stays budget-counted, and the contract-violation finding is disclosed — but the spec text itself never sanctions withholding the pre-fill, so a human hitting a collision loses exactly the beside-rendering ac-1 promises for deciding what changed.\",\"confidence\":0.2}]}\n```" }
frozen: { at: 2026-07-21, commit: f7f1bdf8ba0fa97f8b8feaecaf64dd1641549b82 }

# Alignment report

## Computed

(none)

### Boundary diff vs acceptance baseline

(no impacted services)

### Diagram alignment

- (no accepted proposals)
- (no illustrative diagrams in this spec's body)

## Judged

- **judged-collision-candidate-prefill** [accepted-deviation]: ac-1 states that a regenerated judged finding whose slug matches a prior dispositioned finding "is presented as a candidate — the old ruling and the old text rendered beside the new text" — with no stated exception. The implementation (ReconcileJudged, reaffirm.go) deliberately suppresses the candidate pre-fill whenever the matching slug is part of a within-run collision: no member of the collision gets the side-by-side old-ruling/old-text rendering; the prior is routed to not-resurfaced as a backing record and the human must reconstruct the comparison manually across the not-resurfaced section and the suffixed live members. This is a ledger-adjudicated (L-N13) resolution of the ac-1/ac-4 tension — the prior is never silently carried or discarded, stays budget-counted, and the contract-violation finding is disclosed — but the spec text itself never sanctions withholding the pre-fill, so a human hitting a collision loses exactly the beside-rendering ac-1 promises for deciding what changed. (confidence 0.20) — The L-N13-adjudicated collision exception vs ac-1's unqualified letter: the withholding is deliberate (ambiguous lineage must not be candidate-rendered — the design wave's core refutation); ac-1's text gains the collision-exception clause at the endgame ratification pass, tracked with the ac-2/ac-4 amendments.

### Candidates awaiting reaffirmation

(none)

## Not resurfaced

- **judged-feature-union-superseded-story-archive** [not-resurfaced, was accepted-deviation]: The superseded-story hole previously reported here is now adjudicated as disclose-and-exclude (ledger L-N12, checkFeatureSpecStaleCondition's supersededExtra lines riding every verdict), which cures the SILENCE — but the exclusion itself remains a semantic deviation from ac-4's declared truth-condition: an accepted deviation recorded in a superseded implementing story's archived report contributes exactly ZERO to the feature-close union, where ac-4 says 'counts exactly once, never zero and never twice' over EVERY implementing story's archived report, with no superseded carve-out in the spec's text. The rationale (supersession is the spec-stale counterweight's own prescribed remedy; the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced) is recorded only in the invention ledger and code comments — the provenance discipline's own machinery (an accepted-deviation disposition with a note on this report) is the sanctioned place to carry a deliberate divergence from an AC's literal text, so this is re-surfaced for that recorded human ruling rather than left to pass as if ac-4's universal quantifier held. (confidence 0.30) — The recorded human ruling this finding requests (ledger L-N12, controller-adjudicated at the seventh round): a superseded implementing story's archived accepted-deviations are EXCLUDED from the feature-close union, disclosed by name on every verdict — never silently zero. Rationale: the spec-stale counterweight exists to force supersession over dispositioning-around; once supersession HAS occurred, the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced, so counting them would punish the budget's own prescribed remedy, while silence would launder them. ac-4's universal quantifier gains the superseded-story clause at the endgame ratification pass (with the P2-RT entries) — this disposition is the report-level record of the deliberate divergence until that text lands.
